description_long: This awning features a rectangular canopy with alternating green and black vertical stripes, creating a visually striking pattern. The canopy is supported by a rigid, straight-edged frame along the top, likely made of metal, which provides structural stability. The underside of the awning appears to be open, allowing for shade and shelter beneath. The edge trim of the canopy is straight and clean, with no decorative scalloping or fringe. The awning is designed to be mounted horizontally, most likely above a window or storefront, and does not display any visible branding or signage. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for outdoor urban environments.
description: A rectangular awning with green and black vertical stripes, supported by a straight metal frame and a clean, straight edge trim. Designed for mounting above windows or storefronts, it provides shade and shelter in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full striped canopy and straight edge trim.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the depth of the canopy and the supporting frame structure.
description_view_2: Top or bottom view highlighting the thin profile and the straight, rigid frame.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, showing the frame and canopy depth.
attribute_mounting_location: wall-mounted above a window or storefront facade
